operation: First, initialize a CadQuery workplane aligned to the YZ reference plane. Next, sketch a 2D circle with a radius of 5 units centered at the workplane origin. Finally, extrude this circular sketch a distance of 10 units perpendicular to the YZ plane along the X axis to form the final solid model.
geometry: This is a uniform right circular cylinder, with two identical parallel flat circular end faces connected by a smooth continuous curved lateral surface. Its central longitudinal axis is perpendicular to both end faces, and the cross-section perpendicular to this axis is identical across the full length of the part.
function: This is a standard cylindrical blank that can be used as a spacer, short shaft segment, raw machining stock, or basic structural building block for mechanical assembly and prototyping work.
